channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Elon Musk’s court order against OpenAI gets blocked by federal judge
item.description: A federal judge has denied Elon Musk’s request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk’s claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Tariffs will doom Trump’s attempt to pump crypto
item.description: For cryptocurrency investors, Donald Trump represents a great hope. In the libertarian paradise where tokens on blockchains pave the future of the financial system instead of banks, lenders, and brokerages, Trump could even be a prophet.
item.dc:creator: Scott Nover, Fast Company

item.title: Google Pixel Feature Drop Adds People Tracking to Find My Device
item.description: Discover the latest update on Google's Pixel feature drop, which includes people tracking in the Find My Device app.
item.dc:creator: hamish.hector@futurenet.com (Hamish Hector), TechRadar

item.title: Musk-backed PAC launches first TV ad after Trump address
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk’s America PAC launched its first ever television ad on Wednesday following President Trump’s address to a joint session of Congress. “After four long years of humiliation, a failure at home, and embarrassment abroad, our long, national nightmare is over.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, The Hill

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Digital Audit Trail in Chip Supply Chain: Intel's Assured Supply Chain Program
item.description: Intel's Assured Supply Chain program creates a digital audit trail for customers to track chip development and manufacturing process
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Asus reveals Nvidia RTX 5070 launch pricing, and while one model is at MSRP – thankfully – the others make me want to give up my search for a next-gen GPU
item.description: Asus reveals Nvidia RTX 5070 launch pricing, and it looks steep in places – complete with hints that GPU stock could be shaky, too.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Trump divides crypto world with plans for strategic reserve
item.description: President Trump’s plan for a strategic crypto reserve has stirred mixed feelings within the cryptocurrency industry. The digital assets space has largely welcomed Trump’s mission to boost the industry, which faced heavy regulatory scrutiny under the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The product operating model that’s driving transformation at Modivcare
item.description: Modivcare, which provides services to better connect people with care, is on a transformative journey to optimize its services by implementing a new product operating model.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: MrBeast lost ‘tens of millions’ on his Amazon show. That’s a sign for other creators
item.description: Hollywood is waking up to the power of influencers. That starts with MrBeast. Amazon’s Beast Games cost hundreds of millions to produce. Some of that came from the streamer, but much of it came from the pockets of MrBeast, whose real name is Jimmy Donaldson.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: TSMC will invest $100B in US chip manufacturing
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) plans to invest $100 billion to build chip manufacturing plants in the U.S., President Trump announced Monday. The multibillion-dollar investment, first reported by The Wall Street Journal, will stretch out over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KRON4
